cutoverReality.note: Historical Milestone 2 requirement rows may still mention resolved blockers; use Current Blockers and latest readiness report for live decision state.

requirements.title: Backward compatibility with Casino Side, MP/client, and New Games
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: Compatibility protections were built and major mixed-topology checks passed, but the whole cutover is not yet proven safe because some refactor runtime routes are still not approved and not fully validated.
requirements.blockingReason: Latest readiness remains NO_GO because Phase 4 and Phase 5/6 runtime validations are failing their canary routing checks, plus security dependency audit is pending.

requirements.title: Bank-level JSON/XML communication mode
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The protocol adapter work exists on paper and in tests, but the runtime canary is still failing, so this is not ready as a proven working bank-by-bank capability yet.
requirements.blockingReason: Phase 4 status report shows `wallet_shadow_probe: FAIL` and `phase4_status: NO_GO_RUNTIME_FAILURE` with current environment staying in legacy fallback.

requirements.title: Branding and namespace replacement to ABS (safe waves)
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The project built a safe rename process and completed a small controlled wave, but it did not finish the full brand/name replacement across the whole runtime.
requirements.blockingReason: Phase 9 closure explicitly marks broader runtime config/host/protocol/template rename scope as deferred.

requirements.title: Microservices architecture with Kafka event/control backbone
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The microservice structure and tooling were built, but some important runtime routes are not yet turned on and proven in canary mode.
requirements.blockingReason: Phase 5/6 status shows core services up but gameplay/wallet/bonus/history canary probes failing (`NO_GO_RUNTIME_FAILURE`).

requirements.title: Backup old code and continue in DEV_new new git repository
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This was done. The modernization work is running in a separate `Dev_new` repository, and the repo setup is visible and usable.

requirements.title: Review every file and modernize technologies/versions
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: A lot of modernization work was done, but the proof does not show a completed review of every file, and the dependency audit is still unfinished.
requirements.blockingReason: Security hardening report is `TESTED_NO_GO_DEPENDENCY_LOCK_AUDIT_PENDING` and shows `package-lock.json` count `0` across 8 refactor services.

requirements.title: Upgrade Cassandra to latest while preserving schema and tables
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The Cassandra migration rehearsal work is strong and the copied data matches by row count, but the overall program cutover is still not approved yet.
requirements.blockingReason: Program readiness remains NO_GO for Phase 4/5 runtime and security blockers; Cassandra rehearsal blocker itself is cleared in readiness.

requirements.title: User-friendly web configuration portal with safe workflow
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The portal work clearly exists, including safety workflow design, but this audit package cannot yet prove a non-technical operator can reliably run all daily tasks end to end.
requirements.blockingReason: Evidence is strong for portal specs and guardrail artifacts, but not yet a plain-English tested user guide or audited operator walkthrough proof.

requirements.title: Prepare GS for future modules and pluggable extensions
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The system was moved in the right direction for new modules, and New Games proves that direction works, but the generic extension contract system is not fully proven complete yet.
requirements.blockingReason: Evidence proves practical extension path (New Games via GS) but does not fully prove standardized module contracts/versioning across all future module types.

requirements.title: Separate multiplayer microservice with bank flag isMultiplayer
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The multiplayer split and bank flag logic are implemented and tested at routing-policy level, but the latest evidence still skips part of the canary runtime proof.
requirements.blockingReason: Latest Phase 6 line shows `multiplayer_canary_probe=SKIPPED`, so full runtime canary proof is not complete in the audited snapshot.

requirements.title: Support minimum operational amount down to 0.001
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This looks completed and tested in the audit evidence. The precision modernization phase reached a ready state with zero blocking categories in its verification matrix.

requirements.title: Roadmap M0: Baseline and parity capture
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The project did complete the baseline/parity foundation work and used it for later validation decisions.

requirements.title: Roadmap M1: Repo and governance setup
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The repo/governance setup work was completed and is visible in the current workspace.

requirements.title: Roadmap M2: Observability foundation
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The observability foundation was built and tested, and the required tracing fields are confirmed in evidence.

requirements.title: Roadmap M3: Config platform modernization
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: Most of the config-platform deliverables exist, but the audit evidence is stronger on documentation/scaffolding than on tested day-to-day operator use.
requirements.blockingReason: Milestone 5 user guide and explicit non-technical operator walk-through proof are still pending in the after-project plan.

requirements.title: Roadmap M4: Protocol adapter layer (JSON/XML by bank)
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This milestone is built enough to run and test, but it is not approved because a key runtime canary check is still failing.
requirements.blockingReason: Phase 4 wallet shadow probe failure keeps `NO_GO_RUNTIME_FAILURE` in the latest status report.

requirements.title: Roadmap M5: Core extraction (Session/Gameplay/Wallet/Bonus/History)
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The extracted services are running, but they are not yet approved for cutover because the canary routing checks fail.
requirements.blockingReason: Core service canary routing is disabled/failing (`gameplay_canary_probe=FAIL`, `wallet_canary_probe=FAIL`, etc.).

requirements.title: Roadmap M6: Multiplayer extraction
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The multiplayer extraction milestone is one of the clearest runtime-ready pieces in the current evidence.

requirements.title: Roadmap M7: Cassandra upgrade rehearsal and compatibility validation
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The Cassandra upgrade rehearsal work is strong and appears successful, but it should be treated as rehearsal/validation completion, not final production cutover completion.
requirements.blockingReason: Program-wide cutover remains blocked by Phase 4/5 runtime and security; Cassandra evidence is rehearsal-grade and row-count parity based.

requirements.title: Roadmap M8: Precision modernization
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This milestone has strong closure evidence and appears completed/tested in the audited record.

requirements.title: Roadmap M9: Branding/namespace replacement waves
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The rename-wave process was built and tested on a limited wave, but the full rename result across the platform is intentionally unfinished.
requirements.blockingReason: Phase 9 closure explicitly lists deferred no-go scope for runtime config/host/protocol/template files.

requirements.title: Sprint 01 two-week commitments (baseline + governance + observability minimums)
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: Most Sprint 01 goals were achieved in the project, but this audit cannot prove the original schedule and all exit criteria were met exactly on time from the evidence sampled.
requirements.blockingReason: Evidence confirms outcomes later, but not a single consolidated Sprint 01 completion packet tied to the exact planned window.

requirements.title: New Games: GS remains the core system
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The New Games work followed the plan to use GS as the core platform instead of bypassing it.

requirements.title: New Games: GS keeps core platform responsibilities
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The evidence shows GS still handles key core responsibilities, but this audit does not prove every responsibility in every scenario.
requirements.blockingReason: Sampled proof is strong for wallet/history and launch integration, but not a full responsibility-by-responsibility verification matrix.

requirements.title: New Games backend must not call casino wallet endpoints directly
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The runtime proof shows the correct integration path (through GS), but this audit does not prove there are zero direct wallet calls in every code path without a deeper code audit.
requirements.blockingReason: Need explicit code-level or network-level negative proof for all New Games backend paths to prove "never".

requirements.title: New Games integrates through GS internal APIs/contracts
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This is implemented and proven in runtime evidence. New Games uses GS integration paths rather than a separate direct wallet path.

requirements.title: New Games first game target is Plinko
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: Plinko was clearly used as the first target and has multiple completed milestones and proof packs.

requirements.title: New Games brand direction aligned with BETONLINE
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The audited client proof shows the New Games client branding work followed the BETONLINE direction.

requirements.title: New Games launch target: 200 concurrent players
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The performance proof pack includes the 200-player target and reports passing results.

requirements.title: New Games launch target: 100 bets per second
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The documented load tests exceeded the 100 bets/sec target by a large margin in the audited local proof runs.

requirements.title: Phase 1 compliance scope: no mandatory compliance gates at kickoff
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The decision is clearly written down, but this audit package does not contain enough proof to confirm it was implemented exactly as planned in runtime.
requirements.blockingReason: Need direct runtime config or test evidence confirming compliance gates were intentionally not enforced in the audited phase-1 path.

requirements.title: Keep GS Java stack unchanged for core responsibilities (phase 1)
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The runtime behavior matches the plan (GS still does core work), but this audit does not prove zero changes to all core GS Java internals.
requirements.blockingReason: Need code-level change audit to prove strict "unchanged" claim across the whole core GS stack.

requirements.title: Build new game client in separate modern PixiJS frontend workspace
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: This is clearly implemented and tested: there is a separate New Games client workspace with successful build proof.

requirements.title: Do not replace legacy GS client pipeline globally in phase 1
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The evidence shows the new client work did not replace the legacy client path globally in the audited phase.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M0: foundation definition and API/semantics freeze
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: M0 was probably completed because later milestones depend on it, but the direct proof is not included in this audit package sample.
requirements.blockingReason: Missing dedicated M0 evidence artifact in the shared evidence bundle used for this audit.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M1: GS integration layer in local runtime
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: M1 is clearly delivered and tested in local/runtime evidence.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M2: Plinko backend vertical slice
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The backend vertical slice is delivered and has strong test evidence.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M3: Plinko client vertical slice
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: The client vertical slice is implemented and tested with both build proof and runtime/legacy regression evidence.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M4: performance and stability proof
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: M4 has strong proof. The documented runs passed the stated load and latency goals and include runtime E2E validation.

requirements.title: New Games Milestone M5: beta release and go/no-go packet
requirements.plainEnglishStatus: M5 is still a planned milestone in the audited evidence. There is no proof here that beta rollout and go/no-go packet were completed.
requirements.blockingReason: No M5 completion/proof artifact present in the audited New Games evidence set.

snapshotContext.plainEnglish: Per-requirement verdicts are the Milestone 2 audit baseline. Live cutover state comes from the latest readiness report and can be more advanced than baseline blocker text in individual requirement rows.
